crime.value: Home invasion and kidnapping of 13-year-old Charlie by two masked men searching for something specific
crime.quote: two masked mens looking for something. When one of the men turned around...pulls out a gun

victim.value: 13-year-old Charlie, targeted because the burglars believe he knows what they're looking for
victim.quote: He might know for what we are looking for we should get him

closed_world.value: Charlie's neighborhood at 153 Elm Ave and surrounding area where investigation is taking place
closed_world.quote: A 13 year old boy named Charlie was home alone in 153 Elm ave

culprit_and_motive.value: Two masked men searching for an unspecified item they believe is connected to Charlie or his family
culprit_and_motive.quote: two masked mens looking for something

investigator.value: Officer Carder (Charlie's relative) and a Special Detective investigating the kidnapping
investigator.quote: his realative Officer Carder wait for the Speciaal Detectives to come

suspect_architecture.value: Two masked burglars seeking unknown object, plus mysterious Special Detective with aggressive behavior and unclear motives
suspect_architecture.quote: two masked mens looking for something

clue_fairness.value: Note found in Charlie's room mentioned but contents not revealed to reader
clue_fairness.quote: They noticed a note... Charlies mom puts the note in her pocket

social_world.value: Police hierarchy with aggressive Special Detective berating Officer Carder, family connections (Officer Carder related to victims)
social_world.quote: Officer Carder how can you not see if anyone has seen anything!!! That is your job

investigator_wound.value: Officer Carder torn between professional duty and family loyalty, compromising investigation
investigator_wound.quote: my aunt needs me to confort her.. She needs all the confort that she can get
